hf2267989g53f6g4778ga184g404b22532848: The House of Hope. Where the tired come to rest, and the famished come to feed - lavishly.
h7907098fga068g40a3ga90eg84f65c872d88: Go on. Partake. Enjoy your supper. After all...
h8a42b6f5g4e47g4a57g92d8gbdc8698f1689: ... it might just be your last.
hbac8c138gcbd5g4d83gbb4dga3d7fd52abe8: I will rise as a kith'rak. Your threats do not worry me.
hb1a20613gbd6ag4edagaa4fg40aadcd1bf65: What's better than a devil you don't know?
he2ddd9cag70f2g4930gbda6g6081174b35b6: Am I a friend? Potentially. An adversary? Conceivably. But a saviour? That's for certain.
hdc0474afg56a6g43acga115g8810dd5d63c8: Eloquent words, but I'm not seeking another pact.
h887946ebg21efg4a19g92d5ge90963acaae2: You do not seek it, but it has found you:
h49b8b9c9g45ffg4f79gb5a2g99806045bbf3: Easy, easy. I'm here to help, not harm.
hce201a28g3b39g448fg8e36g285ba8c05b33: One skull, two tenants, and no solution in sight.
hf17e687bg962bg4616gbf72gf57e7bfed9dd: I could fix it all like that.
h87d9098eg048fg46d0gb5e0g736fb4aa633e: I'll do anything to get rid of the tadpole.
he0d64cd4gf634g4be4g9269gd27ddc4c3e3b: Oh. That's disappointing. I prefer it when my clients put up a fight...
h61a84dbag556ag4f37gb5d5g814ba7fbc025: ... only to realise victory was never an option.
he67c3bfcg03adg4a0ag8152g50bd868ed13c: Try to cure yourself. Shop around - beg, borrow and steal. Exhaust every possibility until none are left.
hecacdb4dgadd1g4496gaf9fg9b36bdb3d248: And when hope has been whittled down to the very marrow of despair - that's when you'll come knocking on my door.
h769d6ab2gc2eeg409eg86d1gca7968fb74fc: And if I do want to take this deal - how would I find you?
h19497908g5661g4fe8g8622gc22bf3e6f36f: I'll be around. Watching you squirm like a tadpole through a nice juicy brain.
h8af48c3agbd24g49fbga528g08f9539d0b23: All those pretty little symptoms - sundering skin, dissolving guts - they haven't manifested yet, have they?
h1383e251g0a69g446ag8565g2cd1a8ff8cb9: One might say you're a paragon of luck.
hf69266a9g9c2cg4344ga9d7g2db4ff1d1c82: I'll be there when it runs out.
h4ac1a3d2g5201g4037g9d86g21450f5a5458: I'll have the last laugh in the end.
h13aec6bfgf381g4a05ga1b9g82fff1a04e84: I've always wondered what a laughing mind flayer sounds like.
hc881b2begcaa4g4e0egbe60g1aa7601a6ad3: Take me back. After that, I never want to see you again.
hffdfe871ge540g4c10gbffcg3084f6e48edf: By all means bite the hand that feeds you while you still have teeth.
h6e5e24dfgcaf1g4531g83e2g22d80b9a636e: I'll rip out your mocking tongue.
hdb7e3b97g89a2g49b3gb764gc1a4ad348b90: Ah, yes. The tongue. Yet another piece of pleasurable anatomy you'll soon have to do without.
h342b7fbbg5675g4c66ga64bge887f4f50265: I need to think this over.
hf0e40b43g10c9g4aaagaf06gbd6217695d52: Take all the time you need - but make up your mind before you're counting down with tentacles.
hbdb1cb69gb7acg499dgb3dbg1d2de4d2fc75: You're mad if you think I'll make a deal with a devil.
h76e0b9aag52f2g4a71g90d0ga524959d119c: And what is madness but a denial of reality?
h21c7bd10g6d95g43c4g822ege481f698558f: Still, I've a feeling you'll change your mind. Before it's changed for you...
he80f64bfg96b5g4239g9f11gad55c14260b5: Then fix it, or die at my hand.
h13acc7f2g7515g4c55gbbf5g2ad499b264c8: Yes... I like it when my clients put up a fight...
hf4e6258fg6f93g4795g8de2gc071f3f72035: My, aren't you a nervous one! I assure you I'm here to help, not harm.
h7c0cf82eg6c53g4e23gbd4dga281931b4bdb: What makes you think I need saving?
h4e7ad11cg66c9g48deg8185gd8ea1383e5ca: Come now. Why play hard to get when you're in deep over your tadpoled head?
h04e077e8gf3a9g4e58g8dcag2377024061ba: Because my compassion is boundless. I stride among the needy, giving comfort where I can.
haead7646gbebeg4ed5g9108g590a9dda36b1: And you're in dire need. One skull, two tenants, and no solution in sight.
hf67f2ecbgeef5g4974ga6edg3e78459896fe: I don't care what you are - I care what you want.
ha25d60b1g5e8ag4834ga72fge11d34a0a4cf: Oh, a mere trifle. How dear is one's soul, really?
h23ff4e08gb2fag4f12g9138g229df5f37246: A rhetorical question of course, but let me venture an answer.
h0627e69cg0d53g44a2ga20cg7340beacc396: It's worth very little with a tadpole in your head.
hc96207d7g3d48g4ce1gb027g44500669c076: I'm getting tired of your games.
h48df382cg772ag48ffg9096gaf18bb74cbca: Are you not entertained? Well - far be it from me to disappoint.
h3785c3ebge5a6g4a37g89ebg93def33ef0c5: Not easily rattled, I see. Good. Makes the next part that much more straightforward.
he80de90bgdd4eg4c77gab53g082f33302250: Can you be more specific than 'somewhere'?
h691b5e39gbff9g4c1fgb277g9ff82a471fe9: And deny you the honour of my hospitality?
h3c50d9ffg9e65g4efeg95e6g67507fa27bbd: This is the House of Hope. Where the tired come to rest, and the famished come to feed - lavishly.
h9ab029e9gd7dbg451agbb64gfa6462f733fa: Tut-tut. No need for that crude cutlery of yours. As you can see, I'm amply provisioned.
